locationName: Underway from Frigate Island to Mayreau
tonight: Mayreau — a beautiful small Grenadine island known for quiet anchorages, clear water, beach walks, and big views over the Tobago Cays.
activities: Leaving Frigate Island and sailing to beautiful Mayreau. We will enjoy the passage, the views, the water, and a relaxed arrival into one of the prettiest little islands in the Grenadines.
captainMessage: Today we are leaving Frigate Island and heading to beautiful Mayreau. Mayreau is one of the smallest inhabited islands in the Grenadines, with quiet charm, clear Caribbean water, peaceful anchorages, and views that remind you how lucky we are to be here. Breakfast is omelets onboard, and then we will enjoy the sail and settle into island time.
funnyNote: Crew morale is high. The captain has authorized omelets, island hopping, and another professionally managed day of doing almost nothing in paradise.
locationNote: Manual crew update active for this trip.
note: Updated from the crew dashboard. Manual daily family updates are active for this trip.
automationStatus: No AIS position received for MMSI 368392220 within 120 seconds. Using manual-status.json because no real AIS position exists.
route: Move from Tobago Cays toward Union Island and the Frigate Island area, weather and comfort permitting.

itinerary.route: Move from Tobago Cays toward Union Island and the Frigate Island area, weather and comfort permitting.
itinerary.plannedActivity: Short-hop sailing day, possible Happy Island stop, shore exploring, beach time, and anchorage setup.
itinerary.captainNote: Keep the move short and comfortable. Watch reefs, traffic, and anchorage room.
